headline: Attackers turned widely deployed web software and aging consumer hardware into harvesting infrastructure as a Gravity SMTP WordPress flaw bled secrets and the AryStinger botnet swallowed thousands of D-Link routers.

emerging_trends.text: A medium-severity flaw in the Gravity SMTP WordPress plugin shows how attackers now mine everyday web software for the API keys, OAuth tokens, and secrets that unlock connected systems.

Criminals keep recruiting aging, unpatched hardware into their operations, and the AryStinger botnet's takeover of more than 4,000 D-Link routers converts abandoned home gear into proxies for malicious traffic.

As scammers wield artificial intelligence to terrorize victims, Japan answers in kind, with Osaka police fielding a synthetic officer named AI Ko to teach residents to recognize the digital arrest con.

topics.title: systemd 261 Adds Software TPM
topics.latest_developments: The systemd 261 release ships a software TPM, adds an IMDS cloud-metadata subsystem whose systemd-imdsd daemon exposes a local Varlink API, and carries process state through kexec reboots.
topics.summary: Linux distributions that run systemd as their init system gain TPM-backed security features without dedicated hardware; administrators tracking systemd should plan to adopt the 261 update.

sources.title: The systemd 261 release brings a software TPM, new OS installer

topics.title: AryStinger Router Botnet
topics.latest_developments: BleepingComputer detailed AryStinger, a previously undocumented botnet that has compromised more than 4,000 outdated routers worldwide, many of them D-Link models, and turned them into proxies for malicious traffic.
topics.summary: AryStinger preys on end-of-life routers that owners no longer patch; operators of aging D-Link gear should replace or update the devices to keep them out of the proxy network.

sources.title: AryStinger botnet infected thousands of D-Link routers worldwide

topics.title: Japan's AI Ko Anti-Scam Officer
topics.latest_developments: Frank on Fraud reported that police in Osaka created AI Ko, a synthetic, calm-voiced officer who walks residents through the digital arrest scam spreading across Japan.
topics.summary: The digital arrest scam has fraudsters posing as authorities to frighten victims into paying; Osaka police built AI Ko to teach residents to recognize the con before they fall for it.

sources.title: Japan Built An AI Police Officer To Fight The Fake Ones

topics.title: Gravity SMTP Plugin Flaw Exploited
topics.latest_developments: Threat actors began actively exploiting CVE-2026-4020, an information-disclosure flaw in the Gravity SMTP WordPress plugin installed on roughly 100,000 sites, to extract configuration data, API keys, secrets, and OAuth tokens.
topics.summary: The medium-severity bug, rated CVSS 5.3, lets unauthenticated attackers pull sensitive data from affected sites; administrators running Gravity SMTP should apply the patched release at once.

sources.title: Hackers Exploit Gravity SMTP WordPress Plugin Bug to Expose API Keys

weather: Tonight: Mostly Cloudy then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms, low 62F.
Monday: Showers And Thunderstorms then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms, high 77F.
Monday Night: Showers And Thunderstorms then Mostly Cloudy, low 59F.

games.recap: McCarthy hits leadoff inside-the-park homer off Skenes in Rockies' 2-1 win over Pirates
Gonzalez and Reynolds homer as the Pirates hold off the Rockies 8-6

business_politics.title: Iran Pauses U.S. Talks as Oil Climbs on Doubts
business_politics.latest_developments: Iran paused the Switzerland negotiations after Trump's strike threat, and oil prices rose in early Asian trade as traders doubted the interim deal would hold.
business_politics.summary: Vice President JD Vance and senior Iranian officials opened formal talks Sunday near Lake Lucerne over Tehran's nuclear program and the interim accord meant to end the war, while Trump threatened from afar to strike Iran over its backing of Hezbollah in Lebanon.

sources.title: Oil Prices Rise as Doubts Over U.S.-Iran Peace Deal Grow
US and Iran conduct tense peace talks in Switzerland
Iran Says It Is Pausing Talks After Trump Threats

business_politics.title: Starmer Set to Name Resignation Timetable
business_politics.latest_developments: Allies now expect Keir Starmer to set out a departure timetable within days, clearing the path for Andy Burnham to replace him.
business_politics.summary: Starmer's Labour premiership crumbled after Burnham's by-election win, and the prime minister spent the weekend at Chequers weighing his exit with his wife, Victoria; his departure would give Britain its seventh premier in a decade and raise fresh worries over gilts.

sources.title: Starmer on brink of quitting as UK prime minister
Starmer could announce exit next week, some ministers believe

business.title: Shilo Ranch Lists in Butler County
business.latest_developments: Shilo Ranch, a 340-acre sporting estate at 399 Cornetti Road near Petrolia in Butler County, hit the market with a 17,000-square-foot residence at its center.
business.summary: Pittsburgh Magazine featured the listing of Shilo Ranch, a luxury sporting retreat spanning more than 340 acres of rolling countryside in rural Butler County, anchored by a 17,000-square-foot home.

sources.title: You Can Own Your Own Luxury Sporting Retreat in Butler County

around_town.title: Millvale Holds Pride Celebration
around_town.latest_developments: Millvale filled its streets this weekend with drag performers, live bands, and pay-what-you-want haircuts for a Pride Month gathering.
around_town.summary: Community members gathered in Millvale to watch drag shows and bands, make crafts, and visit local businesses; vendor Caron Spriggs-Bethea said such events help people feel less alone.

sources.title: Annual Pride Month celebration held in Millvale

around_teams.title: Cherington Explains the Bart Trade
around_teams.latest_developments: Pirates general manager Ben Cherington laid out his reasoning for dealing catcher Joey Bart to the Braves and updated the standing of prospect Konnor Griffin, plus Oneil Cruz and Endy Rodriguez.
around_teams.summary: In a Post-Gazette interview, Cherington walked through the Bart-for-Hunter Stratton deal that added bullpen depth and cleared the Pirates' catching logjam, and gave a status report on top prospect Konnor Griffin.

sources.title: Pirates GM Ben Cherington explains the Joey Bart trade, provides a Konnor Griffin update

around_teams.title: Jared Jones Takes a Liner Off His Elbow
around_teams.latest_developments: Pirates starter Jared Jones left Sunday's game in the third inning after a line drive struck his surgically repaired right pitching elbow.
around_teams.summary: The Post-Gazette reported Jones, recently back from elbow surgery, exited the Colorado finale after the comebacker hit his throwing arm, a scary moment as the Pirates avoided a sweep by the Rockies.

sources.title: Jared Jones hit in the elbow by a liner as the Pirates narrowly avoid a sweep in Colorado

team_usa.title: Special Olympics USA Games Open
team_usa.latest_developments: The 2026 Special Olympics USA Games kicked off June 20 in Minneapolis with nearly 3,000 athletes from all 50 states.
team_usa.summary: The weeklong Games gather thousands of Team USA athletes across multiple sports in Minneapolis, with ESPN carrying live coverage and updates.

sources.title: 2026 Special Olympics USA Games: How to watch, live updates and more

team_usa.title: ESPN Makes the Case for the USMNT
team_usa.latest_developments: ESPN argues the U.S. men's national team, fresh off topping Group D as a World Cup co-host, has earned reason to dream of a deep run.
team_usa.summary: With the 2026 World Cup spread across the United States, Canada, and Mexico, ESPN writes that this U.S. squad carries a different feel its players and observers can sense heading into the knockout rounds.

sources.title: If there was a time to dream big about the USMNT

reading.author: Ed Zitron
reading.title: Premium: The Silicon Valley Bubble (Part 2)
reading.summary: Zitron extends his argument that the AI boom is a bubble, building on his scoop that OpenAI spent $34 billion to generate $13.07 billion in 2025 revenue.

reading.author: Stratechery
reading.title: An Interview with Michael Morton About E-Commerce in the Age of AI
reading.summary: Ben Thompson and Michael Morton discuss how AI reshapes e-commerce, covering distribution versus referral models, grocery, autonomous vehicles, and the trouble with unfalsifiable bear cases.

reading.author: Cal Newport
reading.title: AI Isn't Breaking Work. It's Already Broken.
reading.summary: Responding to a Financial Times interview with Rebecca Hinds of the Work AI Institute, Newport contends that knowledge work was already dysfunctional and AI merely exposes the dysfunction.

sports_media: Not Just Football with Cam Heyward
